S

SavingAccount - AccountType中的类
Represents a savings account with a fixed interest rate and term.
SavingAccount() - 类的构造器 AccountType.SavingAccount
Default constructor that initializes the saving account with a unique account number.
SavingAccount(double, String, String, String, double, int, double, String, String) - 类的构造器 AccountType.SavingAccount
Constructs a SavingAccount with specified details.
setAccount(ArrayList<Account>) - 类中的方法 User.User
Sets account.
setAccountName(String) - 类中的方法 AccountType.Account
Set account name.
setAccountNumber(String) - 类中的方法 AccountType.Account
Set account number.
setAccountPassword(String) - 类中的方法 AccountType.Account
Sets account password.
setBalance(double) - 类中的方法 AccountType.Account
Set balance.
setBalance(String, double, Account) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountModifier
Set balance and modified file content.
setDepositLog(String, String, double) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountLog
Set deposit log.
setDepositLog(String, String, double, String) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.exampleCreator
Set deposit log.
setDepositTerm(String) - 类中的方法 AccountType.SavingAccount
Sets the deposit term details including the start time, end time, interest rate, and span.
setDepositTermFinished(String, String, double, double) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountLog
Sets deposit term finished.
setDone(Boolean) - 类中的方法 Task.Task
Sets the completion status of the task.
setEmail(String) - 类中的方法 AccountType.Account
Sets email.
setEmail(String) - 类中的方法 User.User
Retrieves the name of the user.
setEmail(User) - 类中的方法 Page.homeGUI
Sets the email of the user associated with this GUI.
setEmail(User) - 类中的方法 Page.homePageForKid
Sets the email of the kid user associated with this GUI.
setEmail(User) - 类中的方法 Page.homePageForParent
Sets the email of the parent user associated with this GUI.
setEmail(User) - 类中的方法 Page.Page
Set email.
setEndTime(String) - 类中的方法 AccountType.SavingAccount
Sets end time.
setInterest(double) - 类中的方法 AccountType.SavingAccount
Sets interest.
setInterestRate(double) - 类中的方法 AccountType.SavingAccount
Sets interest rate.
setKidsList(ArrayList<String>) - 类中的方法 User.Parent
Sets or updates the list of children's identifiers for this parent.
setMoney(double) - 类中的方法 Task.Task
Sets the monetary value of the task.
setName(String) - 类中的方法 User.User
Sets name.
setParentEmail(String) - 类中的方法 User.Kid
Sets or updates the parent's email address for this child.
setParentSetBalanceLog(String, String, double) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountLog
Set parent set balance log.
setParentSetBalanceLog(String, String, double, String) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.exampleCreator
Set parent set balance log.
setReinforceDepositTermFinished(String, String) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountLog
Sets reinforce deposit term finished.
setSavingLog(String, String, double, String, String, double, int, double) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountLog
Set saving log.
setSpanDays(int) - 类中的方法 AccountType.SavingAccount
Sets span days.
setStartTime(String) - 类中的方法 AccountType.SavingAccount
Sets start time.
setStatus(String) - 类中的方法 Task.Task
Sets the status of the task.
SetTaskHandler - Handler中的类
Handles the action of transitioning from the current page to the set task page in a user interface.
SetTaskHandler(Page, Page) - 类的构造器 Handler.SetTaskHandler
Constructs a new SetTaskHandler with the specified homepage and current page.
setTaskID(int) - 类中的方法 Task.Task
Sets the ID of the task.
setTaskList(ArrayList<Task>) - 类中的方法 User.User
Sets task list.
setTaskLog(String, String, String, double) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountLog
Set task log.
setTaskLog(String, String, String, double, String) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.exampleCreator
Set task log.
setTaskName(String) - 类中的方法 Task.Task
Sets the name of the task.
SetTaskPage - Page中的类
The type Set task page.
SetTaskPage(Page) - 类的构造器 Page.SetTaskPage
Instantiates a new Set task page.
setTransferLog(String, String, String, String, double) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountLog
Set transfer log.
setTransferLog(String, String, String, String, double, String) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.exampleCreator
Logs a transfer transaction as both a sender and a receiver.
setWithdrawLog(String, String, double) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountLog
Set withdraw log.
setWithdrawLog(String, String, double, String) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.exampleCreator
Set withdraw log.
SignUpForm - login中的类
Constructs a new MainFrame, initializing the layout, setting the window's title, default close operation, size, and location.
SignUpForm() - 类的构造器 login.SignUpForm
Constructs a new SignUpForm.
SignUpHandler - login中的类
// This is where the logic to switch back to the login screen is handled. // For example, you can create and display a login form instance
SignUpHandler() - 类的构造器 login.SignUpHandler
 
SubmitHandler - Handler中的类
Handles mouse interactions for submitting tasks through a graphical user interface.
SubmitHandler(DefaultListModel<String>, Page, Page) - 类的构造器 Handler.SubmitHandler
Constructs a new SubmitHandler with the specified list model, homepage, and task retrieval page.
SubmitPage - Page中的类
The type Submit page.
SubmitPage(String, Page, Page) - 类的构造器 Page.SubmitPage
Instantiates a new Submit page.
